description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can of juice with a modern, colorful design. The front label displays the brand name 'FAPELO' in bold, vertical black letters on a white and orange background, with the flavor 'Sweet Orange' indicated below. The can is decorated with abstract orange, cream, and pink patterns, as well as illustrations of orange slices and leaves, suggesting a citrus flavor. The back of the can features a nutritional information panel and additional branding elements, including the phrase '100% NATURAL.' The top of the can is metallic with a standard pull tab for opening. The overall appearance is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, or public parks.
description: A vibrant, cylindrical aluminum can labeled 'FAPELO' Sweet Orange juice, decorated with orange slice graphics and abstract patterns. Features a metallic pull tab and a visible nutritional information panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FAPELO' brand label, 'Sweet Orange' flavor text, and an orange slice illustration at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting abstract orange and cream patterns with leaf motifs, no visible text or nutritional panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panel, partial 'Sweet Orange' text, and more orange-themed graphics.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the '100% NATURAL' badge, abstract patterns, and partial flavor text.
